$comment: Native config shared by ALL generated apps. The generator applies this to each freshly-added native project. Per-app differences live in apps/<id>/, not here.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Shows nearby information and your position on the map.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to scan codes and capture photos inside apps.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Lets you save images to your photo library.
